summary: Iteration 10 - Complete testing of P0 Duration Tiers Simplification. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Homepage Upcoming Programs section shows 3 cards with interactive duration tier selectors (1 Month/3 Months/Annual). Annual tier correctly displays 'Contact for Pricing' when price=0. Flagship Programs section shows all 6 programs with tier selectors. Admin Panel Programs tab shows Excel-like pricing table with Duration/AED/INR/USD/Offer columns.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 programs correctly seeded as flagship with 3 duration tiers each
Annual tier with price_aed=0, price_inr=0, price_usd=0 correctly triggers 'Contact for Pricing' in UI
UpcomingProgramsSection.jsx correctly implements DurationSelector with data-testid attributes
ProgramsSection.jsx correctly implements DurationSelector component for flagship programs
ProgramDetailPage.jsx displays 3 tier cards with proper 'Contact Us' button for Annual tier
AdminPanel.jsx has Excel-like pricing table with Duration/AED/INR/USD/Offer AED/Offer INR/Offer USD columns
Admin form correctly shows helper text: 'Set price per duration. Leave Annual at 0 = Contact for Pricing'
Backend programs.py correctly filters with visible_only and upcoming_only query parameters
seed_data_creation: All 6 programs pre-seeded as flagship with 3 tiers: 1 Month (priced), 3 Months (priced), Annual (price=0)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Duration Tiers simplification complete. All 6 programs are flagship with 3 tiers. Annual tier always has price=0 to show 'Contact for Pricing'. Admin Excel-like pricing table works for editing tiers. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_duration_tiers_iteration10.py. Phone OTP is MOCKED.
